issues.description: First effect missing duration constraint. Text states 'cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' — requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' to prevent attacks during opponent's turn only, not permanent Rest.
Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The card prevents attacks (a conditional lock), not mechanically resting. Should use 'GiveKeyword' with keyword:'CannotAttack' and appropriate duration.

Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOrLeader' is overly broad. Card text specifies 'Your opponent's rested Leader OR up to 1 of your opponent's Characters other than [Monkey.D.Luffy]' — requires conditional target logic (if leader is rested, target leader; else target one character excluding Luffy).
Second effect with trigger:'Trigger' and action KO is spurious and not in card text. Should be removed entirely.
TrashFromHand action requires optional flag ('optional':true) since card text says 'You may trash'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 card with a [Trigger] from your hand: Your opponent's rested Leader or up to 1 of your opponent's Characters other than [Monkey.D.Luffy] cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.
